name: Drop First
description: Hook hits bar 1 — full energy from the jump. YouTube retention killer: no intro, instant payoff. Strip back into verse, then double down.

sections.name: drop_1
sections.label: Drop (Hook)
sections.description: EVERYTHING hits bar 1 — melody, drums, 808, the works. This IS the hook. Viewer knows what the beat is in 2 seconds.

sections.name: verse
sections.label: Verse 1
sections.description: Pull back — strip drums to core groove, bass rides. Breathing room for the rapper.

sections.name: build
sections.label: Build
sections.description: Quick tension ramp — perc rolls, melody variation, riser FX into drop 2.

sections.name: drop_2
sections.label: Drop 2
sections.description: Second full hit — same energy as bar 1 but feels earned after the verse.

sections.name: verse
sections.label: Verse 2
sections.description: Second verse groove — keep the pocket.

sections.name: breakdown
sections.label: Breakdown
sections.description: Strip to melody + keys only — contrast before final drop. Longest quiet moment in the beat.

sections.name: drop_3
sections.label: Final Drop
sections.description: Longest drop — ride it out. Everything in, no holding back.

sections.name: outro
sections.label: Outro
sections.description: Quick fade — melody rings, elements strip out.
